exportDescription: Exports workspace files as an Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundle: one markdown concept per file with YAML frontmatter. Text is extracted from PDF and Office documents; other binaries are referenced as metadata only.
importDescription: Imports an OKF bundle (zip of markdown concepts) into this project's workspace.
importSummary: {{files}} file(s) imported to {{target}}, {{indexed}} indexed for search.
targetFolderHelp: Project-relative folder for the bundle. A suffix is added automatically if it already exists.
